ops.text: getaway expand: a cached trip detail with {"segments": []} (a legitimate known-empty cache state) passes _detail_matches_cabin(detail, "J") because all([]) is True, so the expander treats it as a real leg and _endpoints crashes with IndexError on segs[0] (verified directly during the W7 capstone against the reseeded cache). Empty-segment cached details must read as "no itinerary" in the expander — skip, don't crash. Fix queued as a W7-adjacent commit.
